art_market.summary: Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 (Mar 27-29) opened at HKCEC today. 240 galleries from 41 countries participating, featuring new 'Echoes' platform and 'Zero 10' digital section.
top_stories: Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 kicks off with high engagement; 'Echoes' and 'Zero 10' sectors drawing major attention.
Strong market activity with notable sales; Korean artists Lee Bul and Kim Yun-shin gaining significant collector interest.
Continued strength in blue-chip works alongside rising digital art initiatives.

stock_market.summary: KOSPI fell ~3% to 5,220.10, struggling amid Middle East instability and market panic over Google's 'TurboQuant' semiconductor efficiency gains.
key_factors: Escalating U.S./Israel-Iran tensions driving Brent crude surge (+5.8%).
Google's 'TurboQuant' algorithm announcement causes sell-off in memory chip giants (Samsung, SK Hynix).
Investors weigh Jevons Paradox vs. immediate demand destruction concerns.
